Visual appearance is fully customizable through CSS custom properties defined on the
root element. Override any variable in your own stylesheet to change colors, sizes, spacing, and animations — no need to touch the library source or add extra build steps.
Shared variables for button sizing and appearance across all button types.
All CSS custom properties with their default values:
language-css shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight
